data.title: Justice Department Flags Potential Legal Issues With Elon Musk-Backed $1M Voter Giveaway: America PAC Hits Back — Media Meltdown Only Helping 'Efforts To Support President Trump'
data.description: The Justice Department warned Musk-backed America PAC over its $1M voter giveaway, citing potential violations of federal law, while the PAC insists the initiative is lawful and continues daily lotteries through Election Day.

data.title: Tesla, Spirit Airlines, IBM, Boeing, And ARM Holdings: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: U.S. markets closed lower on Wednesday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average falling nearly 1% to 42,514.95

data.title: Tesla's Gross Margin Shows Worst Is Behind, Creating A 'Goldilocks' Scenario For Bulls, Says Dan Ives — Elon Musk-Led EV Giant Surges Over 12% In After-Hours Trading
data.description: Tesla Inc.'s third-quarter earnings report revealed signs of a significant turnaround in gross margins, leading prominent Wall Street analyst Dan Ives to declare that the worst may be behind the electric vehicle maker.

data.title: Tesla's Bitcoin Pile Intact Despite Recent Wallet Moves — Elon Musk-Led Company HODLes King Crypto For 5th Straight Quarter
data.description: Electric vehicle juggernaut Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) revealed none of its Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) holdings were sold in the third quarter, extending its HODLing period for the fifth successive quarter.

data.title: Kamala Harris Endorsed By Insane Clown Posse Rapper: 'I Want Her To Win Because She's A Democrat'
data.description: Vice President Kamala Harris received an endorsement from Violent J of Insane Clown Posse, who expressed support for her during an appearance on "The Daily Show."
